title: onobrychis sulphurea subsp. sulphurea
intro: Onobrychis sulphurea subsp. sulphurea, also known as Yellow Melilot or Sulphur Yellow Melilot, is a plant species in the pea family that is native to the mountainous regions of Central Asia. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antispasmodic, and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Onobrychis sulphurea subsp. sulphurea include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate rheumatic pain, and soothe digestive issues. The herbal preparations of the plant include infusions, decoctions, and tinctures, which can be used to treat various health conditions.
